Welcome to Carmine

Mount your OneDrive and SharePoint libraries as local folders. Sign in with your Microsoft 365 account to get started.

Signing in...

Complete the sign-in in your browser.

Browser didn't open? Copy the link and paste it manually.

Add Cloud Sources
OneDrive
~/Cloud/OneDrive
SharePoint Libraries
Added

You're all set

Your drives are mounted and ready to use. You'll find them in your file manager.

    Carmine will continue running in the system tray.
